zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Bours於1124年出生時，她的父親Louis de Bours de Bournonville22歲，母親Jehanne de Rollancourt17歲。她於1140年與Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1178年享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Bours于1124年出生时，她的父亲Louis de Bours de Bournonville22岁，母亲Jehanne de Rollancourt17岁。她于1140年与Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1178年享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bours
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Boer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ralf, Hans, Kurt.  Dutch Gerret, Marinus, Adriaan, Cornelis, Egbert, Gerrit, Gert, Kees.
Dutch and North German: occupational name for a farmer or landsman, from Dutch boer, Middle Low German būr ‘dweller, citizen, neighbor, farmer’ (see Bauer ). Compare De Boer and Den Boer .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Bours was born in 1124, her father, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, was 22 and her mother, Jehanne de Rollancourt, was 17. She married Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval in 1140, in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1178, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Bours est née en 1124, son père, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Jehanne de Rollancourt, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval en 1140, à Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1178, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Bours 1124 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis de Bours de Bournonville 22 und ihre Mutter Jehanne de Rollancourt 17. Sie hat 1140 in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1178 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Bours è nata il nel 1124, sua padre, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Jehanne de Rollancourt, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval nel 1140, nel Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1178, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスオルヘイン
ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Boursが1124年に生まれた時，父Louis de Bours de Bournonvilleは22歳，母Jehanne de Rollancourtは17歳であった。1140年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレスニコウルト-レ-ドルメンでWallérand d'Olhain-Mingovalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1178年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Bours(이)가 1124년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis de Bours de Bournonville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jehanne de Rollancourt(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1140년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레스니쿠르트-레-도멘에서 Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Bours nasceu em 1124, seu pai, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Jehanne de Rollancourt, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval em 1140, em Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1178, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Bours родилась в 1124 г., её отцу по имени Louis de Bours de Bournonville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jehanne de Rollancourt, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval в 1140 г. в местности фресникоурт-ле-долмен, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1178 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Bours nació en 1124, su papá, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jehanne de Rollancourt, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval en 1140, en Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1178, a la edad de 54 años.
